name: Westfall
short_description: Westfall is a cooperative/collaborative horror game where you collect precious stones from cursed towns of the wild west.
detailed_description:
WestFall – Can You Survive the Cursed West?

“The cursed town of the West… Every bounty hunter's soul eventually finds its way to WestFall.
Some came for fortune, others for fame. But none ever returned.”

WestFall offers a thrilling co-op survival experience set in a dark Western universe.
Rotting saloons, abandoned mines, and haunted train stations fill a land where every footstep echoes—but who’s listening remains a mystery...

You and your crew are bounty hunters, scouring the outskirts of the town to recover valuable loot and pay off your debts. But when night falls, the spirits of the past awaken. Now, you're not just fighting for riches—you're fighting for your soul.

Key Features:

  • Horror + Western Fusion: A one-of-a-kind survival experience in a gothic Wild West setting.

  • Co-op Gameplay: Team up with 1-4 players. Take the job. Make it out. Or vanish forever.

  • Dynamic Missions: Each run brings new threats, rewards, and a different fate.

  • Mysterious Enemies: Ghost cowboys, vengeful spirits, and shadowy unknown horrors.

  • Time-Based Tension: When the sun sets, it doesn’t just take the light—it takes the hope with it.

In WestFall, your courage, your silence, your strategy—and your loyalty—will all be tested.
Remember: Everyone who enters WestFall… ends up on the wanted list.

Join the team of bounty hunters assembled by Dr. William and complete challenging missions. Use the money you earn to make your train more comfortable or invest in more effective equipment to chase bigger rewards. Make sure to collect the targeted amount of valuable gems on the last day of the cycle!

In a town that you will only visit at night like experienced bounty hunters, you will have limited time to move unnoticed. Complete your mission within the given time and make sure you leave no one behind from your team!
